ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/agents-towards-production
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/agents-towards-production
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repository delivers end-to-end, code-first tutorials covering every layer of production-grade GenAI agents, guiding you from spark to scale with proven patterns and reusable blueprints for real-world launches.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
Language: jupyter-notebook
Qwen3-VL is the multimodal large language model series developed by Qwen team, Alibaba Cloud.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: advimman/lama
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/advimman/lama
Language: jupyter-notebook
🦙 LaMa Image Inpainting, Resolution-robust Large Mask Inpainting with Fourier Convolutions, WACV 2022

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ageron/handson-ml3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ageron/handson-ml3
Language: jupyter-notebook
A series of Jupyter notebooks that walk you through the fundamentals of Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Python using Scikit-Learn, Keras and TensorFlow 2.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-cookbooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/happy-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/happy-llm
Language: jupyter-notebook
📚 从零开始的大语言模型原理与实践教程

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/llm-universe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/llm-universe
Language: jupyter-notebook
本项目是一个面向小白开发者的大模型应用开发教程，在线阅读地址：https://datawhalechina.github.io/llm-universe/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/audiocraft
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/audiocraft
Language: jupyter-notebook
Audiocraft is a library for audio processing and generation with deep learning. It features the state-of-the-art EnCodec audio compressor / tokenizer, along with MusicGen, a simple and controllable music generation LM with textual and melodic conditioning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov3
Language: jupyter-notebook
Reference PyTorch implementation and models for DINOv3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/sam2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/sam2
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the Meta Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM 2), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/segment-anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/segment-anything
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the SegmentAnything Model (SAM), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp-for-beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. Designed for developers, it focuses on practical techniques for building modular, scalable, and secure AI workflows from session setup to service orchestration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/openai-cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/openai-cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Examples and guides for using the OpenAI API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: warproxxx/poly_data
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/warproxxx/poly_data
Language: jupyter-notebook
Polymarket Data Retriever that fetches, processes, and structures Polymarket data including markets, order events and trades.
